description: An illegalist anarchist group active in Western Europe in the early 1890s, composed of French and Italian militants. The gang committed a series of burglaries and played a central role in the Trial of the Thirty. Its members were convicted, leading to the group's dissolution.

country_links.evidence_quote: using Belgium and London as bases
country_links.context: The gang used Belgium as a base for burglaries in Northern France.

country_links.evidence_quote: visiting Barcelona, Brussels, London and Perpignan
country_links.context: Ortiz traveled to Barcelona as part of his activities.

country_links.evidence_quote: using Belgium and London as bases
country_links.context: The gang used London as a base for fencing stolen goods and as a hub for operations.
